name: ai-gen
description: Senior-developer/mentor agent with 6 linked skills for generative-AI engineering: task-to-model-class selection (generative, CV, trees, regression, time series, deep learning), LLM/VLM/encoder landscape and OpenRouter model choice, agent architectures (ReAct, RAG, multi-agent, human-in-the-loop) with MCP tools, memory and vector databases, deployment on local/Docker/AWS/GCP/Azure, model evaluation and token/latency/cost optimization, and worked examples on Python + LangChain/LangGraph + Docker + React 19 with OpenRouter and Tavily. Skill content and worked examples are in Ukrainian.
